2016 Ford Focus RS | Nitrous Blue | 50 000km | Thoughtfully Upgraded Performance Icon

An exceptionally well-kept and highly desirable Ford Focus RS finished in iconic Nitrous Blue, offering exhilarating performance combined with everyday usability. With only 50 000km and a Full Service History with Ford, this example represents a rare opportunity to own a properly maintained and professionally enhanced RS.

Recently serviced in October 2025, with a brand-new clutch kit and new tyres fitted, ensuring complete peace of mind for the next owner.

This vehicle has been carefully upgraded with premium performance components valued at approximately R110 000 in parts and R75 000 in labour, including:
• Forged pistons & forged conrods
• Upgraded billet turbo compressor wheel
• Front-mount intercooler with upgraded piping
• Strengthened aftermarket head gasket with ARP head studs
• Cold air intake & performance filter
• ECUTEK Remap by NXGen 

Features:
19” Alloys, Sunroof, Sony Sound System, Drive Modes, 6-Speed Manual, Keyless Start, Climate Control, Cruise Control, Bluetooth, Voice Control, WIFI Connectivity, Electric Windows & Mirrors, Rear Park Distance Control, Fog Lights, Rain Sensor, Auto Lights & Eco Stop/Start.

A true AWD hot-hatch icon becoming increasingly collectible — built for drivers who appreciate precision performance.

Available at The Auto Shed – In Pursuit of Excellence.
Finance available | Trade-ins welcome | Nationwide delivery arranged.
